description:
You bump into him.

Changed bot to limited and removed the "Dead Dove" tag :)

Gender neutral pronouns are used for User, but can be changed in later messages (turn off immersive mode to edit messages). User is also 18 or older.

Sorry for the short intro, I made this originally on c.ai mobile, and I don't feel like changing it too much.

Idk what TWs to put, so if there's any I need to put, please let me know.
